Usage: gokart new (create,init) <project> ... [flags]

Create a new GoKart project.

Arguments:
  <project> ...    Project name.

Flags:
  -h, --help       Show context-sensitive help.
      --version    Print version information and quit.

Project
  --flat             Use a single-package root layout (default).
  --structured       Use a managed cmd/ and internal/ layout for later
                     integrations.
  --module=STRING    Go module path.
  --example          Include a runnable greet command and tests.

Integrations / Configuration
  --db="none"              Database backend.
  --ai                     Include OpenAI client.
  --redis                  Include Redis cache.
  --local                  Use local-only config.
  --global                 Enable global config.
  --config-scope="auto"    Config scope.

Safety / Verification
  --dry-run              Preview scaffold operations without writing files.
  --force                Overwrite all existing files.
  --skip-existing        Skip files that already exist.
  --no-manifest          Opt a structured project out of GoKart management.
  --verify               Force post-generation tests and build.
  --no-verify            Skip tests and build, but still prepare dependencies.
  --verify-only          Tidy, test, and build an existing project without
                         scaffolding.
  --verify-timeout=5m    Maximum verification time; zero disables timeout.

Automation
  --json    Print machine-readable JSON result.
